column9: 122241406: I am able to clearly identify my personal values.
column11: 122241408: I am able to ask for help when I need it.
column13: 122241410: I feel confident helping others through difficult situations
column15: 122241412: I recognize when I need help.
column17: 122241414: I take time to think about what's important in life -­­ who I am, what I value, where I fit in, and where I'm going.
column19: 122241416: I have clearly defined goals related to positive work/life integration (balancing personal and professional time).
column21: 122241418: If I had a goal for my future that involved a financial commitment, I would feel comfortable following a plan to achieve that goal.
column23: 122241420: I feel confident building and managing a monthly budget.
column25: 122241422: I have a working knowledge of credit (credit cards, credit report, credit score).
column27: 122241424: I feel confident in following through with a savings plan.
column29: 122241426: I know how to research the cost of living and its impacts on my budget.
column31: 122241428: I would feel confident negotiating my salary when offered a future job.
column33: 122241430: I have a resume that I would feel confident using in a job application tomorrow.
column35: 122241432: I have a LinkedIn Profile that accurately reflects my experience and professional interests.
column37: 122241434: I feel confident writing a cover letter for a job that interests me.
column39: 122241436: I feel confident attending a networking event (this could be a career fair or social gathering aimed at professional advancement).
column41: 122241438: I know how to speak about my professional interests and personal strengths when meeting with a potential employer (elevator pitch).
column43: 122241440: I have a plan to pay off my debts (student loans, credit card balances, personal loans from family/friends, etc.) If I don’t have debts today, I would be able to create a plan to pay off any future debts I may incur.
column45: 122241442: Even though I may have some nerves or anxiety, I feel confident in my ability to have a job interview where I feel I’ve presented myself to the best of my ability.
column47: 122241444: I feel ready to launch my career.
